title: Halal Cod Bliss
description: A tangy, tender Mexican-inspired dish featuring cod cooked sous-vide and served with a delicious sauce.
instructions: Season the cod fillets with salt and pepper.
Sous vide the cod for 4 hours at 130°F (54°C).
Blend coconut aminos, Dijon mustard, lime juice, chili paste, minced garlic, and mango chutney in a blender until smooth. Set aside.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add cod fillets to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
Pour the sauce into the pan with the cooked cod, letting it simmer gently for 1-2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve hot as an indulgent Mexican dish.
